spec_match.rationale: Exercises a real surface of the spec's headline behaviour — caret-shape: auto | bar | block | underscore for editable elements…

interactive.rationale: The form and comparison grid update a computed-style readout as fields receive focus or input.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The lede matches the feature-index framing: caret shapes vary by editable field type and mode.

edge_cases.rationale: Feature detection and the invalid curly keyword branch are surfaced in the support note and readout.

references.rationale: The concept page now includes the required canonical ChromeStatus self-heal link https://chromestatus.com/feature/6106160780017664.

design_system.rationale: Raw colour fallbacks and inline styles were replaced with shared CSS variables and semantic classes.

summary: Verified with chrome-devtools-mcp 1.1.1 on Chrome Canary: focused first name, age, password, verification code, and auto comparison inputs. Computed caret-shape returned bar/underscore/block/underscore/bar, invalid curly was false, and console/network were clean.
